title: nymphaea nouchali var. ovalifolia
intro: Nymphaea nouchali var. ovalifolia, also known as the Blue Star Water Lily or Blue Star Lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae and is native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Nymphaea nouchali var. ovalifolia include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and rhizomes can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
